name: ESCALON MEDICAL CORP
headquarters: Wayne, Pennsylvania (reincorporated); operations in Lake Success
summary: Escalon Medical Corp. is a Pennsylvania corporation that develops, manufactures, markets, and distributes medical devices for ophthalmic applications. Key products include A-Scan and B-Scan ultrasound devices, UBM high-frequency ultrasound, pachymeters, intraocular gases (C3F8 and SF6), disposable surgical packs for vitreoretinal surgery, and the AXIS Image Management system. Products are sold globally through independent sales representatives, distributors, and internal sales staff to medical institutions.
